🌵 REGISTRATIONS OPEN FOR DESERT STORM

To secure your spot, send me a private message so we can assign your position on the battlefield.

Priority will be given to those who actively request to participate.

Participation is essential for your growth and overall performance.

This is one of the most important events to make you stronger.

Be online at your chosen time. With full participation, we become stronger and more competitive.

🪖 DESERT STORM – LAST DAY TO REGISTER
